intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. No processes should be spawned from temporary directories.
notes: Nested chain: /tmp/a.sh spawns /tmp/b.sh which spawns curl. Tests that spawned_from_tmp detects multi-level /tmp/ lineage.

live.inject_cmd:
cat > /tmp/ocsec_b.sh << 'BEOF'
#!/bin/bash
curl -sS -m 8 --resolve one.one.one.one:443:{TARGET_IP} https://one.one.one.one/ >/dev/null
BEOF
chmod +x /tmp/ocsec_b.sh
cat > /tmp/ocsec_a.sh << 'AEOF'
#!/bin/bash
/tmp/ocsec_b.sh
AEOF
chmod +x /tmp/ocsec_a.sh
/tmp/ocsec_a.sh
rm -f /tmp/ocsec_a.sh /tmp/ocsec_b.sh
